messages.content: I want to find the length of jsonData.data.mediaDetails and if it has more than 1 object, loop through them. Please modify my original code to do that. Thanks
I want mp4 urls from each loop stored in separate objects. Now it is adding all the urls from each loop to a single mp4filesizes.
combine the code for both video and image including if there is more than 1 video and as well if it's a quoted quote and show me complete code again. thanks
for images, will it send all the images in high resolution if there are 4 images in a tweet or quoted tweet? If not, can you provide complete code again to do that?
It is sending the same video multiple times. Please create an object to temporarily save all the sent urls and check it before sending another video.
still same videos are sent multiple times. also please use some other alternative other than Set as the code stays in memory and it is not working when another user sends the same url

Actually I don't want to persist the state between different invocations. I only want to track the sent urls only when the code is running. it shouldn't affect if I run the code again. Show me full complete code again for that please
I'm running this code in cloudflare workers and can't install any libraries. Please show me some other alternative methods within javascript to do that and show me complete code
show me complete code for getMp4FileSize and sendVideoToTelegram and processMediaDetails function.
still is is sending the same video multiple times due to racing or something. How to avoid that? The images are sent just fine but each video is sent 2 or 3 times. Show me complete code.

Nope, still same issue persists. Please do it this way. First extract all the urls in both mediadetails and quotedmediadetails and store it in a set excluding duplicates. then finally send only unique video urls through promises.all. Show me complete code again without skipping anything
this code doesn't include the code for images. Please show me complete code for both videos and images without skipping a single line of code. Thanks

still the same issue exists and I found out the reason for the issue. each mediaDetails has several resolutions available for the same video and your code is extracting all the mp4 urls inside each media for each resolution. please find only 1 mp4 url with that is less than 50MB and highest resolution available for each media. Show me complete code again without skipping anything. thanks

Uncaught SyntaxError: await is only valid in async functions and the top level bodies of modules at worker.js:732:27 (Code: 10021)

it shows this error for this line : 'const fileSize = await getMp4FileSize(variant.url);'
now it is working perfectly but sometimes the highest resolution available video is not sent. in that case, I want to try sending second highest resolution video available. how to do that?

that logic doesn't work as each resolution url has unique filename as well as pathname. please find from where you extract the variants and sorting the available resolutions and retry sending them until success
Please show me the complete code for collectMediaVariantsAndImageUrls function as I can't to figure out which code to add from previous code
